layers.seeds: Canon seed — minimal corpus fingerprint for verification and distribution
layers.ledger: Append-only canon registry — immutable record of registered canon versions
layers.semantic: Concept index — non-canonical semantic layer over the corpus
layers.navigator: Concept graph and study paths — non-canonical navigation layer
layers.mirror_endpoint: Distributable mirror snapshot — for peer-to-peer synchronization

invariants: Canon text is never modified after ingestion
Ledger is append-only — existing entries never overwritten
Semantic and Navigator layers are additive — never modify CSL
seed_integrity_hash must match after every full rebuild
